/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/test_compressible_embeddings.dir/test/test_compressible_embeddings.cu.o -o test_compressible_embeddings  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ec2-user/compressible_embeddings/build libcompressible_embeddings.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib64/librt.a -lcublas -lgomp -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
